name: Low-Fat Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 cups of water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add the vegetables and simmer until tender (about 10 minutes).
3. Blend some of the vegetable-cooking liquid with half the vegetables in a blender or food processor.
4. Heat olive oil in a small nonstick skillet. Add 2 tablespoons of the cooking liquid and stir in the flour until smooth.
5. Gradually add the remaining cooking liquid, stirring constantly until thickened.
6. Stir in the blended vegetables, instant chicken bouillon, salt, pepper, and nutmeg. Bring to a boil and simmer for 1 minute.
7. Stir in the evaporated skim milk and heat through.
Makes about 9 cups. Per 1 1/2 cups: 86 calories; 1 mg cholesterol; 5 g dietary fiber; 3 g fat; 371 mg sodium. Source: T-Factor Diet book FROM: PATRICIA MCCOY. I saved this from p on 9/25/91. Judy Garnett/NC pjxg05a
